title: ampelopsis delavayana var. tomentella
intro: Ampelopsis delavayana var. tomentella, also known as the Chinese vine or Tomentella grape, is a deciduous climber with a complex network of stems and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampelopsis delavayana var. tomentella are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to support overall well-being.
